query: SELECT id, streamerName, livestreamDate, duration, salesAmount, gmv FROM brand_livestreams WHERE liverId IS NOT NULL AND livestreamDate >= '2026-02-01' ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, streamerName, livestreamDate, duration, salesAmount, gmv FROM brand_livestreams WHERE liverId IS NOT NULL AND livestreamDate >= '2026-02-01' ORDER BY livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 20;
